title: Workplace small talk
subtitle: Talk about work without needing advanced vocabulary.
duolingoBridge: A2 learners need safe, repeatable small talk.
overview: Knowledge point 1: ask about the day and workload.
Knowledge point 2: answer with simple adjectives and reasons.

sections.title: Work small talk map
rows: do you have a lot of work?

items.fr: Salut, ça se passe bien aujourd’hui ?
items.en: Hi, is it going well today?

items.fr: Oui, mais j’ai beaucoup de travail.
items.en: Yes, but I have a lot of work.

items.fr: La journée est longue, mais ça va.
items.en: The day is long, but it is okay.
items.es: El día es largo, pero está bien.

items.fr: On prend un café après la réunion ?
items.en: Shall we have a coffee after the meeting?
items.es: ¿Tomamos un café después de la reunión?
